about.aboutMeHeader: Full-Stack Engineer specialized in Scalable Systems
about.aboutMeText: I'm a Full-Stack Engineer who views code as a tool for business growth. Whether you're an HR looking for a technical lead or a business owner needing a robust MVP, I deliver quality that exceeds industry standards. I specialize in crafting high-impact digital experiences that drive measurable results.

currentRole.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
currentRole.desc: Leading backend architecture with Python/Django and building high-performance frontend systems using Nest.js. Developing strategic Gym Management Software and complex E-commerce ecosystems.

previousRole.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
previousRole.desc: Engineered scalable web applications and high-end RESTful APIs with Python/Django and React.js.
